claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements harness boundary audit that prevents PRD readiness when evidence agents mutate target project files or when required evidence results are missing.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot and diffBoundarySnapshots implement file digest-based boundary audit using SHA256
evidence.why: Core boundary audit implementation that detects mutations by comparing cryptographic file hashes before and after agent execution.

evidence.summary: Runtime captures boundary snapshot before spawning evidence agents and again after all agents complete
evidence.why: Evidence that boundary audit is integrated into the agent execution lifecycle, not an optional or post-hoc check.

evidence.summary: Boundary violations add BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers to readiness and set prd_ready=false
evidence.why: Direct causal chain from detected mutation to PRD readiness being blocked, proving the harness boundary audit enforces the contract.

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness requires complete evidence results for explorer, cross-checker, and verifier roles under cross_check policy
evidence.why: Evidence that missing evidence agent results create EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED blockers that prevent PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS defines explorer, cross-checker, and verifier protocols with writes_code=false and cross_checker required_when cross_check
evidence.why: Protocol definition that evidence agents are read-only by contract and cross-check is mandatory for high-risk existing-project facts.

evidence.summary: requiredEvidenceRoles returns [explorer, cross-checker, verifier] for cross_check policy and [explorer, verifier] for single_agent
evidence.why: Evidence that the three-agent protocol is required for careful routing to existing projects.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues generates PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE and PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blockers when evidence lacks project scope or concrete locators
evidence.why: Evidence that scope validation directly produces readiness blockers when agents fail to cite project paths.

evidence.summary: buildDemandEvidenceDispatchPlan sets execution_policy with writes_business_code=false, agent_instruction=boundary_controlled, agent_tool_profile, and project_mutation=forbidden
evidence.why: Dispatch plan declares boundary constraints including explicit project_mutation=forbidden before any agent execution begins.

evidence.summary: buildDemandEvidenceAgentPrompt generates agent instructions including Boundary: do not modify target project files and agent_tool_profile
evidence.why: Evidence that boundary constraints are communicated directly to agents in their prompt, not only enforced post-hoc.

evidence.summary: runDemandEvidenceDispatchRuntime requires executeAgents=true and allowAgentDispatch=true flags before running evidence agents
evidence.why: Evidence that evidence agent execution requires explicit authorization flags; dry_run is default and dispatch returns early without execute or allow.

evidence.summary: External-only evidence test validates PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE blocker when evidence agents cite external URLs for existing-project facts
evidence.why: Test evidence that the router validates evidence scope and blocks PRD readiness when project facts lack project-scoped evidence.

evidence.summary: Project evidence path locator test validates PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blocker when project-scope evidence lacks concrete file paths
evidence.why: Test evidence that project-scoped evidence requires repo-relative paths or file locators to satisfy PRD readiness.

evidence.summary: Cross-check PRD readiness test validates that missing cross-checker and verifier results create EVIDENCE_AGENT_RESULT_REQUIRED blockers
evidence.why: Test evidence that all three evidence agents (explorer, cross-checker, verifier) must complete before cross_check PRD readiness passes.

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA_DEFINITION defines required fields: claim, confidence, evidence, assumptions, risks, missing, recommendation
evidence.why: Evidence result schema contract that all evidence agents must satisfy; missing fields result in normalization failures and blockers.

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult sets status=blocked and recommendation=block when evidence lacks scope declaration or provider run fails
evidence.why: Evidence that malformed or failed agent results are converted to blocked status before being added to PRD readiness blockers.

evidence.summary: inspectEvidenceAgreement detects conflicts when evidence agents disagree on claim recommendations and adds EVIDENCE_AGENT_CONFLICT blockers
evidence.why: Evidence that cross-checker disagreement with explorer creates blockers, preventing averaging-away of conflicts.

risks: If boundary audit fails to detect mutations due to filesystem race conditions or ignored files, PRD readiness could pass despite project changes.
If evidence agents circumvent boundary instructions through external tooling or indirect writes, the harness may not block corrupted demands.
If provider-adapter shell execution escapes the boundary snapshot visibility, mutations could occur undetected.

result.notes: Evidence confirms YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements full harness boundary audit with SHA256-based snapshot diffs, explicit authorization gates, and multi-agent cross-check protocol that blocks PRD readiness on boundary violations, missing results, or malformed evidence.
